---
title: "Talks"
toc: false
---

## Invited Talks & Presentations

**Penn Grad Talk — Finalist** (2026)
University of Pennsylvania

{{< video https://vimeo.com/1179294328 >}}

**Penn Three Minute Thesis (3MT) — Audience Choice Winner** (2026)
University of Pennsylvania

{{< video https://vimeo.com/1182502162 >}}
